board_csa_architect.notes: mfa_required boolean on auth_policies. Login gate checks and redirects to MFA setup. Clean design.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Org-level mandate strengthens security posture. Essential for enterprise tenants.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Depends on REQ-L1-32 for MFA setup UI. Otherwise users blocked at login with no way to enable MFA.
